dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6974 IH: Improving MA SNP Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Arrington introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to permit additional accrediting organizations to approve specialized MA plans for special needs individuals.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Improving MA SNP Act of 2026.

section.header: Accreditation of specialized MA plans for special needs individuals
section.text: Section 1859(f)(7) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395w–28(f)(7)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the heading, by striking NCQA approved and inserting approved by an accrediting organization;
by inserting , based on standards established by the Secretary, after approved; and

by striking (based on standards established by the Secretary) and inserting or, for 2026 and subsequent years, by any other private accrediting organization with an application approved under section 1852(e)(4)(C) determined appropriate by the Secretary.
